recommendations.title: Feast III: The Happy Finish
recommendations.overview: The survivors are saved by the mysterious prophet who seemingly has the ability to control the beasts. Along the way they get help from a karate expert.

recommendations.title: Feast
recommendations.overview: When a motley crew of strangers find themselves trapped in an isolated tavern, they must band together in a battle for survival against a family of flesh-hungry creatures.

recommendations.title: Piranha 3DD
recommendations.overview: After the events at Lake Victoria, the prehistoric school of blood-thirsty piranhas make their way into swimming pools, plumbing, and a newly opened water park.

recommendations.title: The Collection
recommendations.overview: Arkin escapes with his life from the vicious grips of "The Collector" during an entrapment party where he adds beautiful Elena to his "Collection." Instead of recovering from the trauma, Arkin is suddenly abducted from the hospital by mercenaries hir

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Vampire Girl vs. Frankenstein Girl
recommendations.overview: A reconstructed girl is created from the pieces of a vampire girl's mini-butchery. Slaughter abounds as both of them pursue the same boy.

recommendations.title: From Dusk Till Dawn
recommendations.overview: After kidnapping a father and his two kids, the Gecko brothers head south to a seedy Mexican bar to hide out in safety, unaware of its notorious vampire clientele.

recommendations.title: Elvira: Mistress of the Dark
recommendations.overview: Arriving in the small town of Fallwell, Massachusetts to claim her inheritance, horror hostess Elvira receives a less than enthusiastic reception from the conservative locals, including her sinister uncle Vincent.

recommendations.title: Mad God
recommendations.overview: A figure known as "The Assassin" descends from the heavens into a nightmarish pit full of monsters, titans, and cruelty.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.
